items.title: Crew owners get 18th NWSL team for record fee
items.summary: The NWSL awarded an expansion franchise to Columbus, Ohio, and an ownership consortium led by the Haslam Sports Group. The new Columbus-based team will begin play in 2028.

items.title: NWSL awards 18th expansion team to Columbus in bid led by Crew owners, will begin play in 2028

items.title: Venus Williams loses 10th straight singles match
